# Smoke Test Fixture

This file is consumed by the CI smoke test:
`mked view --plain tests/fixtures/smoke-fixture.md`

## Features

- **Bold** and _italic_ text
- `inline code`
- [Links](https://github.com/scmccart/mked)

## Code block

```csharp
Console.WriteLine("Hello, mked!");
```

> A blockquote for good measure.
